titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Kevin Killian and Dodie Bellamy Papers
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday September 26, 2020 at 03:08

did.unittitle: Kevin Killian and Dodie Bellamy papers

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.
Boxes 83-85 (audiovisual material): Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
Box 86 (digital media): Restricted fragile material. Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Granary Books on the Edwin J. Beinecke Book Fund, 2015.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into eight series: I. Correspondence, 1973-2015. II. Writings, 1952-2014. III. Professional Papers, 1941, 1979-2015. IV. Research Files, 1977-2009. V. Personal Papers, 1948, 1965-2005. VI. Photographs, 1965-2012. VII. Audiovisual Materials, 1977-2012. VIII. Electronic Media, 1991-2008.

bioghist.head: Kevin Killian
bioghist.p: Kevin Killian (1952-2019) was an American poet, writer, editor, and playwright. Killian and co-editor Peter Gizzi won the American Book Award for poetry in 2009 for My Vocabulary Did This to Me: The Collected Poetry of Jack Spicer (Middletown, Conn.: Wesleyan University Press, 2008). He was a co-founder of the Poets Theater performance group in San Francisco. Killian was married to Dodie Bellamy.

bioghist.head: Dodie Bellamy
bioghist.p: Dodie Bellamy is an American novelist, writer, journalist, and editor. Her work is associated with the New Narrative literary movement. Bellamy was married to Kevin Killian.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Kevin Killian and Dodie Bellamy Papers. Yale Collection of American Literature, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections as they are acquired, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
This collection received a basic level of processing, including rehousing and minimal organization.

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of correspondence, writings, professional papers, research files, personal papers, photographs, audiovisual materials, and electronic media documenting the lives and work of Kevin Killian and Dodie Bellamy. The correspondence documents their personal, professional, and family networks and includes writers, poets, and collaborators. Writings include published and unpublished works by both Killian and Bellamy. Professional papers include essays, talks, and other papers documenting their work and careers. Research files document Bellamy's research on Sam D'Allesandro for Real: The Letters of Mina Harker and Sam D'Allesandro (Hoboken, N.J. : Talisman House, 1994), and Killian's research on Jack Spicer for My Vocabulary Did This to Me: The Collected Poetry of Jack Spicer, which he co-edited with Peter Gizzi. Personal papers include juvenilia, schoolwork, reviews, flyers, teaching materials, memorabilia, papers relating to Poets Theater, and other papers. Photographs include 8 x 10 prints, in both color and black and white, which mostly consist of portraits of Bellamy, Killian, and many other individuals. Photographs also include a series of photographs taken by Kevin Killian titled "Tagged," as well as general photographs of events and performances. Audiovisual materials include interviews regarding Jack Spicer, additional interviews, music, and other recordings. Electronic media includes audio recordings, research materials, digital photographs, and commercially-produced media.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Kevin Killian and Dodie Bellamy Papers is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Correspondence is organized into two groups. The first is arranged and listed alphabetically by correspondent. The second is arranged in several roughly alphabetical groupings but has not been sorted into a single sequence.

separatedmaterial.head: Separated Materials
separatedmaterial.p: 2 DVD-Rs removed for separate housing. See Box 86.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Identified by Kevin Killian and Dodie Belamy as "Japanese Guy"

separatedmaterial.head: Separated Materials
separatedmaterial.p: 2 CDs removed for separate housing. See Box 83.

did.unittitle: Harryman, Carla (IOU Theater 1995 Poets Theater at Intersection)

separatedmaterial.head: Separated Materials
separatedmaterial.p: 1 CD-R removed for separate housing. See Box 86.

did.unittitle: Kevin Killian, Bedrooms Have Windows (Amethyst Press, 1990)
Dody Bellamy, "The Debbies I Have Known" (Feminist Studies, Vol. ro, no. 2, Summer 1984)
Kevin Killian, I Cry Like A Baby (Painted Leaf Press, 2001)
Dody Bellamy, The Letters of Mina Harker (University of Wisconsin Press, 2004)
The Letters of Mina Harker Original Gallies
The Letters of Mina Harker Contract
Dodie Bellamy, Real: The Letters of Mina Harker and Sam D'Allesandro (Talisman House, 1994)
Kevin Killian and Leslie Scalapino, Stone Marmalade (Singing Horse Press, 1996)
Kevin Killian, Tagged: Variations on a Theme (Gravity and Trajectory, 2013)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Chapter titles, as recorded on folders by KK and DB: "Suffragette", "Midnight", "Carey", "Icicle on the Beach", "The Yellow Supper", "A Little Classical Music for your Kids", "Lovelita Mann", "Moth to a Flame", "Calling Sister Midnight", "The White God", "Wild Chocolate", "It's the Volcanoe", "Negroes in the Snow", "Androgynes", "The New Rythum", "Time to Unfreeze", "In Graham Greene", "Breakfast...With and Iron", "Sister Midnight", "Anticipation", "I'll Put on Some Silver", "Ishtar", "Another Time", "Rendezvouse with a Swede".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Chapter titles, as noted by KK and DB: "Variations on a Dream", "Picnic", "While you Here do Snoring Lie…", "College Girl", "Gimme Splendor", "Stray Cat Blues", "Miscarriage", "Something Natureal But Very Childish", "Hay Fever", "Cymbeline", "Marriage", "Promised Land"

did.unittitle: In Every Dream Home - A Heartache
Ouija Poem Wirtten by KK and 36 others
There But for the Grace of God Go I
A Mental Melange of Melodic Memories, Original

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Photograph was removed from frame, but is permanently adhered to glass. Handle with care.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1500+ 8X10 prints in both color and black and white. Original negatives are included. Recent photographs are made using a digital camera.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Kevin Killian's photographs of (mostly nude) men posing with a drawing of male genitalia by Raymond Pettibon. Photographed as Killian's "investigation of masculinity and how the visible signs of our gender don't necessarily dictate what lies beneath, within, ahead."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: General photographs consist of 4x6 photographs, mostly housed in the original printing envelopes. Most envelopes are labelled with identifying information. Some negatives included. Some envelopes also contain photo CDs.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Compact discs containing scans of photographs created by developers were not removed during processing.

did.unittitle: #350 copy, Robin Blaser reading works by Jack Spicer & himself
did.materialspec: Static can be heard. The program is distorted at times. The right channel was recorded at a lower level from the beginning of the tape until 30:33. Sound is extremely muffled from 30:34 until the end of the tape.
The program begins abruptly. The program is distorted at times. High background noise can be heard. Audio, at times, may sound hollow or unclear.

did.materialspec: Static and a high amount of buzz can be heard. A high amount of hum is also present. The program is distorted at times. Audio in the right channel is at a lower level from 25:11-37:25.

did.materialspec: The program begins and ends abruptly. The program is distorted at times. Audio, at times, sounds unclear or hollow. The right channel was recorded at a lower level from the beginning of the tape until 30:30. The left channel was recorded at a lower level from 30:31 until the end of the tape.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Audiovisual material. Restricted fragile. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.materialspec: The program begins and ends abruptly. The right channel was recorded at a lower level. High background noise can be heard. There is a warble during the program. Static is present. The program is distorted at times.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A mix of music is recorded from 01:00:53 until the end of the tape.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Audiovisual material. Restricted fragile. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
